The Mailchimp Transactional API (formerly Mandrill) enables sending personalized, one-to-one transactional emails such as password resets, order confirmations, and welcome messages. It provides high-deliverability email infrastructure with detailed analytics, templates, and webhook support.

Contact Support:
 Name: Mailchimp API Support
 Email: apihelp@mailchimp.com
